case.title: Variant Annotation from Reference-Aligned Edits
case.workflow: Align a public reporter CDS to a derived chromophore variant and explain the difference in protein terms.

records.name: EGFP_CDS
records.origin: Engineered fluorescent reporter derived from the Aequorea victoria GFP family.
records.why_it_matters: EGFP is a canonical lab reporter: great for teaching translation, cloning, sequence verification, and how a few codons can change an optical phenotype.

records.name: EGFP_Y67H_training_variant
records.origin: Training derivative of EGFP that changes the aromatic residue in the chromophore-forming motif.
records.why_it_matters: This is not a random mutation. It models the idea that one codon change near a chromophore can produce a large optical shift, which is a powerful lesson for variant interpretation.
records.source_label: Derived from EGFP mutant logic described in GFP engineering literature
